text.content:
2
*�����������������MThe DMX Out POP is used to collect all fixtures from the network and send the DMX channels out to the actual devices via ArtNet, sACN, Kinet, or DMX via supported serial devices.

Each fixture must have a unique DMX address. The DMX Out POP will not rearrange channels but warn or error for overlapping addressing.

DMX Fixture POPs can either be connected to the input of the DMX Out POP or referenced on the POP's Fixtures parameter page. Each seperatly referenced fixture can be activated or deactivated on the DMX Out POP.

One can also make use of wildcards while specifying fixtures.
